title: Homepage hero renders Bengali heading/description and quick stats with live badge
description: Verifies the Homepage Hero loads with the expected Bengali content and the quick stats panel including the live badge.

steps.description: Verify element "Quick stats panel" is visible

title: Open PAN application modal from primary CTA "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন"
description: Verifies clicking the primary CTA opens the PAN application modal from the homepage hero.

steps.description: Click on "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন" button
Verify element "PAN application modal" is visible

title: Open PAN application modal from secondary CTA "অ্যাপয়েন্টমেন্ট বুক করুন"
description: Verifies clicking the appointment CTA opens the same PAN application modal.

steps.description: Verify element "PAN application modal" is visible

title: Close PAN application modal using the modal close button
description: Verifies the PAN application modal can be dismissed via its close control and is no longer visible.

steps.description: Verify element "PAN application modal" is visible
Click on "Close" button in the modal
Verify element "PAN application modal" is not visible

title: Submit PAN application from hero modal and see confirmation
description: Verifies completing the PAN application form in the modal and submitting shows a visible submission confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন" button
Verify element "PAN application modal" is visible

title: Attempt to submit PAN application with empty required fields shows validation
description: Verifies submitting the PAN application modal without filling fields shows visible validation messages and does not show confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন" button
Verify element "PAN application modal" is visible

title: Invalid mobile number format prevents submission and shows error
description: Verifies entering an invalid mobile number shows a visible error and blocks successful submission confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন" button
Verify element "PAN application modal" is visible

title: PAN modal remains usable after open/close/open cycle from hero CTA
description: Verifies the modal can be opened, closed, and opened again from the hero without losing basic UI functionality.

steps.description: Click on "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন" button
Verify element "PAN application modal" is visible
Click on "Close" button in the modal
Verify element "PAN application modal" is not visible
Click on "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন" button
Verify element "PAN application modal" is visible

title: Open PAN application modal from a service card in the bento grid
description: Verifies a user can reach the PAN application modal by using the Apply button on a service card.

steps.description: Scroll to the service bento grid section
Verify element "service bento grid" is visible
Verify element "a service card with an Apply button" is visible
Click on "Apply" on a visible service card

title: Successful PAN application submission from the modal (happy path)
description: Verifies a user can open the modal, complete the form with valid inputs, submit, and see a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Scroll to the service bento grid section
Click on "Apply" on a visible service card

title: Invalid PAN application submission shows validation errors
description: Verifies the PAN application form blocks submission and displays visible validation messages for invalid inputs.

steps.description: Scroll to the service bento grid section
Click on "Apply" on a visible service card

title: Submitting with empty fields shows required-field errors
description: Verifies submitting the modal with no inputs shows visible required-field validation messages.

steps.description: Scroll to the service bento grid section
Click on "Apply" on a visible service card

title: Switch focus within the modal and ensure inputs remain editable
description: Verifies basic modal usability by moving between fields and confirming inputs accept text.

steps.description: Scroll to the service bento grid section
Click on "Apply" on a visible service card
Click on "Full Name" field in the modal

title: Open PAN application modal from hero CTA and submit successfully, then close
description: Verifies the PAN application modal opens from the homepage hero CTA, accepts valid inputs, shows a success confirmation, and can be closed via the close button.

steps.description: Type "Rahim Uddin" into the name field
Type "123412341234" into the Aadhaar number field

title: Open PAN application modal from a service card Apply button and verify it appears
description: Verifies the PAN application modal can be opened from a service card apply action on the homepage.

steps.description: Click apply button on a service card
Verify element "PAN application" modal is visible

title: Required-field validation errors appear when submitting empty PAN application form
description: Verifies submitting the modal with required fields empty shows field-level validation errors.

steps.description: Verify element "PAN application" modal is visible

title: Correct validation errors and submit successfully from service card entry
description: Verifies a user can trigger validation errors, then correct inputs and successfully submit to see a confirmation message.

steps.description: Click apply button on a service card
Type "Karim Ali" into the name field
Type "987698769876" into the Aadhaar number field

title: Invalid Aadhaar format shows validation error and blocks success
description: Verifies an invalid Aadhaar number produces a visible validation error and does not show a success confirmation until corrected.

steps.description: Type "Mita Das" into the name field
Type "12AB" into the Aadhaar number field

title: Close PAN application modal by clicking the backdrop
description: Verifies the modal can be dismissed using a backdrop click and is no longer visible afterward.

steps.description: Verify element "PAN application" modal is visible
Click on the backdrop outside the modal
Verify element "PAN application" modal is not visible

title: Close PAN application modal via close button without submitting
description: Verifies the user can open the modal and exit using the close button without submitting the form.

steps.description: Verify element "PAN application" modal is visible
Verify element "PAN application" modal is not visible

title: Successful submission shows confirmation content within the modal
description: Verifies that after a valid submission, a visible confirmation message is shown within the modal UI.

steps.description: Type "Sadia Khan" into the name field
Type "111122223333" into the Aadhaar number field

title: Verify Aadhaar successfully with a valid 12-digit number
description: Confirms the PAN application modal allows entering a valid Aadhaar number and shows a visible success indication after verification.

steps.description: Click on the PAN application button in the homepage hero/service section to open the PAN application modal
Type "123412341234" into the Aadhaar number field
Click on the "Verify" or "Submit" button for Aadhaar verification
Verify text indicating Aadhaar verification success is visible

title: Show validation error for Aadhaar number that is too short
description: Ensures the UI blocks verification and shows a visible validation message when Aadhaar length is less than 12 digits.

steps.description: Click on the PAN application button in the homepage hero/service section to open the PAN application modal
Type "12345678901" into the Aadhaar number field
Click on the "Verify" or "Submit" button for Aadhaar verification
Verify text indicating an invalid Aadhaar number or required 12 digits is visible

title: Show validation error for Aadhaar number that is too long
description: Ensures the UI shows a visible error when more than 12 digits are entered and verification is attempted.

steps.description: Click on the PAN application button in the homepage hero/service section to open the PAN application modal
Type "1234123412345" into the Aadhaar number field
Click on the "Verify" or "Submit" button for Aadhaar verification
Verify text indicating an invalid Aadhaar number or wrong length is visible

title: Show validation error for Aadhaar containing non-numeric characters
description: Confirms the input is validated and a visible error is shown when letters/symbols are used in the Aadhaar field.

steps.description: Click on the PAN application button in the homepage hero/service section to open the PAN application modal
Type "1234ABCD1234" into the Aadhaar number field
Click on the "Verify" or "Submit" button for Aadhaar verification
Verify text indicating only digits are allowed or Aadhaar format is invalid is visible

title: Show required-field error when Aadhaar is empty and user clicks verify
description: Validates that attempting verification with an empty Aadhaar field produces a visible required/empty error message.

steps.description: Click on the PAN application button in the homepage hero/service section to open the PAN application modal
Click on the Aadhaar number field
Click on the "Verify" or "Submit" button for Aadhaar verification
Verify text indicating Aadhaar number is required is visible

title: Allow correcting an invalid Aadhaar and then verifying successfully
description: Ensures a user can fix validation errors by updating the Aadhaar number and then see a success indication.

steps.description: Click on the PAN application button in the homepage hero/service section to open the PAN application modal
Type "12345" into the Aadhaar number field
Click on the "Verify" or "Submit" button for Aadhaar verification
Verify text indicating an invalid Aadhaar number is visible
Type "123412341234" into the Aadhaar number field
Click on the "Verify" or "Submit" button for Aadhaar verification
Verify text indicating Aadhaar verification success is visible

title: Aadhaar verification UI is available and actionable inside PAN modal
description: Confirms the Aadhaar verification section renders in the PAN modal with an input and a verify/submit control visible.

steps.description: Click on the PAN application button in the homepage hero/service section to open the PAN application modal
Verify element "Aadhaar number" field is visible
Verify element "Verify" or "Submit" button for Aadhaar verification is visible
Type "123412341234" into the Aadhaar number field
Click on the "Verify" or "Submit" button for Aadhaar verification
Verify text indicating Aadhaar verification success is visible

title: Track application status with a valid tracking ID shows a result
description: Verifies that entering a valid tracking ID and submitting displays an application status result on the tracking page.

steps.description: Type "VALID-TRACK-12345" into the tracking ID field
Verify element "application status result" is visible

title: Invalid or non-existent tracking ID shows not-found/no-results message
description: Verifies that submitting an invalid tracking ID displays a visible error or no-results message.

steps.description: Type "NOT-A-REAL-ID-000" into the tracking ID field
Verify element "application status result" is not visible

title: Submitting with an empty tracking ID shows a required/validation message
description: Verifies that the user cannot submit tracking without providing a tracking ID and sees a visible validation message.

steps.description: Verify element "application status result" is not visible

title: Whitespace-only tracking ID is rejected with a validation message
description: Verifies that a tracking ID consisting only of spaces is not accepted and a visible validation message is shown.

steps.description: Type "     " into the tracking ID field
Verify element "application status result" is not visible

title: Tracking ID with leading/trailing spaces still returns result (trim behavior)
description: Verifies that a valid tracking ID with extra leading/trailing spaces still produces a visible status result.

steps.description: Type "  VALID-TRACK-12345  " into the tracking ID field
Verify element "application status result" is visible

title: Pressing Enter in the tracking ID field submits the form and shows result
description: Verifies keyboard submission works by pressing Enter after entering a valid tracking ID.

steps.description: Type "VALID-TRACK-12345" into the tracking ID field
Verify element "application status result" is visible

title: Second search replaces the previous result with the new result/error state
description: Verifies that running a second tracking search updates the UI from the previous state to the new state.

steps.description: Type "VALID-TRACK-12345" into the tracking ID field
Verify element "application status result" is visible
Type "NOT-A-REAL-ID-000" into the tracking ID field

title: Long tracking ID input is handled without breaking the page
description: Verifies the tracking page remains usable when a very long tracking ID is entered and submitted.

steps.description: Verify element "application status result" is visible

title: Admin dashboard loads and shows sidebar modules
description: Verifies the admin dashboard entry page renders and the sidebar navigation is visible with key modules.

title: Navigate from Admin to Services and verify services tables/stats are visible
description: Verifies selecting Services from the sidebar opens the Services module and shows expected UI elements like stats and a data table.

title: Navigate from Services to Citizens and verify citizens table is visible
description: Verifies switching modules using the sidebar updates the page to the Citizens module and renders a citizens data table.

title: Navigate through additional modules (Finances, Fleet, Logistics) from the sidebar
description: Verifies key operational modules are accessible from the sidebar and each module page renders its main content area.

steps.description: Verify element "Finances module content" is visible
Verify element "Fleet module content" is visible

title: Navigate through remaining modules (Marketplace, AI, Risk, Workforce) from the sidebar
description: Verifies the remaining admin modules are reachable and each route loads with visible module content.

steps.description: Verify element "Marketplace module content" is visible

title: Services module supports creating a service in the UI (local state)
description: Verifies creating a service updates the visible services list within the same session (UI-only local state).

steps.description: Verify element "Create service form" is visible
Type "Test Service Alpha" into "Service name" field
Verify text "Test Service Alpha" is visible

title: Services module supports editing an existing service in the UI (local state)
description: Verifies editing a service and saving updates the visible data in the services table within the same session.

steps.description: Click on "Edit" for the first service in the list
Verify element "Edit service form" is visible

title: Header link 'পরিষেবাসমূহ' scrolls to Services section on homepage
description: Verifies that clicking the Services link in the fixed header scrolls the homepage to the services section and shows the services bento grid.

steps.description: Verify text "পরিষেবাসমূহ" is visible on the page
Verify element "services" bento grid is visible

title: Header link 'আবেদনের স্থিতি (Track Status)' navigates to /track
description: Verifies that clicking the Track Status link in the header navigates to the tracking page and shows the tracking input.

steps.description: Verify element "আবেদনের স্থিতি (Track Status)" is visible
Click "আবেদনের স্থিতি (Track Status)" in the header
Verify element "application tracking" input is visible

title: Header button 'Nexus Command' navigates to /admin dashboard
description: Verifies that clicking the Nexus Command button in the header navigates to the admin dashboard and shows dashboard content.

steps.description: Verify text "Nexus Command" is visible on the page

title: Header remains usable after scrolling and Services link still works
description: Verifies the fixed header remains accessible after scrolling and the Services link still scrolls to the services section.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify element "services" bento grid is visible

title: From /track, user can return to homepage and use Services header link
description: Verifies navigation from tracking page back to homepage and that the Services header link scrolls correctly.

steps.description: Verify element "services" bento grid is visible

title: From /admin, user can return to homepage via brand link
description: Verifies that the header brand link returns the user from the admin dashboard to the homepage.

steps.description: Verify text "Nexus Command" is visible on the page

title: Services link does not navigate away from homepage (stays on /)
description: Verifies that clicking the Services header link performs in-page navigation and does not change to a different route.

steps.description: Verify element "services" bento grid is visible

title: Footer renders with key sections on the homepage
description: Verifies the homepage footer is visible after scrolling and shows its main sections/links.

steps.description: Scroll to the footer section at the bottom of the page

title: Footer Privacy link navigates to Privacy Policy page
description: Verifies clicking the Privacy link in the footer navigates to /privacy and shows policy content.

steps.description: Scroll to the footer section at the bottom of the page

title: Footer Terms link navigates to Terms of Service page
description: Verifies clicking the Terms link in the footer navigates to /terms and shows terms content.

steps.description: Scroll to the footer section at the bottom of the page
Verify element "Terms of service" is visible

title: Privacy Policy page is reachable directly and shows content
description: Verifies the /privacy route loads and displays privacy policy content.

title: Terms of Service page is reachable directly and shows content
description: Verifies the /terms route loads and displays terms content.

steps.description: Verify element "Terms of service" is visible

title: Footer links remain usable after navigating away and returning to homepage
description: Verifies footer links work consistently after visiting a legal page and returning to the homepage.

steps.description: Scroll to the footer section at the bottom of the page
Click on "Home" (site logo or homepage link) to return to the homepage
Scroll to the footer section at the bottom of the page
